=== Last updated: 1.2.7 ===
Here's the list of the DTNP variants that you could find and their location.

=== Overworld ===
{| class="wikitable"
|+
!No.
!Variant
!Location
!Image
!Special
|-
|1
|Cherry
|Cherry Grove
|[[File:Cherry.png|300x300px]]
|
* Cherry Petal Trails
|-
|2
|Lemony Lime
|Beach
|[[File:Lemony_lime.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|3
|Himalayan Salt
|Jagged Peaks
|[[File:Himalayan_salt.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|4
|Bamboo
|Bamboo Jungle
|[[File:Bamboo.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|5
|Birch
|Birch Forest
|[[File:Birch.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|6
|Pistachio
|Mangrove Swamp
|[[File:Pistachio.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|7
|Guacamole
|Meadow
|[[File:Guacamole.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|8
|Yuzu
|Snowy Beach
|[[File:Yuzu.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|9
|Cappuccino
| rowspan="4" |Dark Forest
|[[File:Cappuccino.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|10
|Espresso
|[[File:Espresso.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|11
|Latte
|[[File:Latte.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|12
|Mocha
|[[File:Mocha.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|13
|Bonito Flakes
|Wooded Badlands
|[[File:Bonito_flakes.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|14
|Brown Mushroom
| rowspan="2" |Mushroom Field
|[[File:Brown_mushroom.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|15
|Red Mushroom
|[[File:Red_mushroom.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|16
|Kombu
|Desert
|[[File:Kombu.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|17
|Shitake
|Dark Forest
|[[File:Shitake.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|18
|Enoki
|Desert
|[[File:Enoki.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|19
|Strawberry
| rowspan="3" |Snowy Plains
|[[File:Strawberry.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|20
|Vanilla
|[[File:Vanilla.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|21
|Chocolate
|[[File:Chocolate.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|22
|Walnut
|Old Growth Spruce Taiga
|[[File:Walnut.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|23
|Coral Brain
| rowspan="5" |Warm Ocean 
(Only in Coral Reefs)
|[[File:Coral_brain.png|300x300px]]
| rowspan="5" |
* Swimmer Dog Max

|-
|24
|Coral Bubble
|[[File:Coral_bubble.png|300x300px]]
|-
|25
|Coral Fire
|[[File:Coral_fire.png|300x300px]]
|-
|26
|Coral Horn
|[[File:Coral_horn.png|300x300px]]
|-
|27
|Coral Tube
|[[File:Coral_tube.png|300x300px]]
|-
|28
|Icy
| rowspan="2" |Ice Spikes
|[[File:icy.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|29
|Frosty
|[[File:frosty.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|30
|Muddy
| rowspan="4" |Savanna
|[[File:muddy.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|31
|Root Beer
|[[File:root_beer.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|32
|Sooty
|[[File:sooty.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
|33
|Brindle
|[[File:brindle.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
| colspan="5" |'''Total: 33'''
|}

=== Nether ===
{| class="wikitable"
!No.
!Variant
!Location
!Image
!Special
|-
|1
|Crimson
|Crimson Forest
|[[File:Crimson.png|300x300px]]
|
* Glow Overlay
|-
|2
|Warped
|Warped Forest
|[[File:Warped.png|300x300px]]
|
* Glow Overlay
|-
|3
|Molten
|Basalt Deltas
|[[File:Molten.png|300x300px]]
|
* Glow Overlay

* Lava Particle and Trails
* Fire, Fall Damage Immune
|-
|4
|Withered Soul
| rowspan="2" |Soul Sand Valley
|[[File:Withered_soul.png|300x300px]]
|
* Glow Overlay
* Soul Fire Particle
* Fire, Fall Damage Immune
|-
|5
|Wandering Soul
|[[File:Wandering soul.png|300x300px]]
|
* Glow Overlay
* Sparkly Particle
* Fire, Fall Damage Immune
|-
|6
|Sanguine
| rowspan="2" |Nether Waste
|[[File:Sanguine.png|300x300px]]
|
* Fire, Fall Damage Immune
|-
|7
|Desiccated
|[[File:Desiccated.png|300x300px]]
|
* Fire, Fall Damage Immune
|-
| colspan="5" |'''Total: 7'''
|}

=== End ===
{| class="wikitable"
!No.
!Variant
!Location
!Image
!Special
|-
|1
|Ender
| rowspan="2" |End Highlands
|[[File:Ender.png|300x300px]]
|
* Glow Overlay
|-
|2
|Chorus
|[[File:Chorus.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
| colspan="5" |'''Total: 2'''
|}

=== Special ===
{| class="wikitable"
!No.
!Variant
!Location
!Image
!Special
|-
|1
|VSCode
|''unobtainable through survival (for now)''
|[[File:Vscode.png|300x300px]]
|
|-
| colspan="5" |'''Total: 1'''
|}

=== <big>TOTAL: 43</big> ===
'''*Obtainable in survival: 42'''
